remember: Students will be able to define and explain the concept of Human Development.
Students will be able to recall the components of Human Development Index (HDI).
Students will be able to identify the indicators used to measure human development.
understand: Students will be able to explain the importance of human development in a country's overall growth.
Students will be able to describe the relationship between human development and economic development.
Students will be able to distinguish between human development and economic development.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concept of human development to real-life scenarios.
Students will be able to use HDI data to compare the human development of different countries.
Students will be able to suggest ways to improve human development in a given region or country.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the strengths and weaknesses of the Human Development Index (HDI) as a measure of development.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of various factors on human development.
Students will be able to compare and contrast the human development of different countries or regions.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1, to understand the concept and importance of human development.
To analyze the components of Human Development Index (HDI) and its limitations.
To recognize the relationship between human development and other development indicators.
board_exam_objectives: What are the key components of Human Development Index (HDI) and how is it calculated?
How does human development affect the overall growth of a country?
What are the major challenges and opportunities for human development in India?
